name: compliance sync mechanism: running sync twice in a row produces no net new folders or modifications on the second run
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro generated-code-quality-standards && printf -- '- id: nist-ai-rmf
  name: NIST AI RMF
  url: https://example.com
  authoritative_publisher: NIST
  jurisdiction: us-government
  applicable_to: [ai-systems]
  identifier_scheme: nist-framework
  why_authoritative: |
    Federal.
    Authoritative.
    Widely adopted.
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: false
  paywalled: false
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/sync-from-sources.sh" --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --target "$PWD/generated-code-quality-standards" && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/sync-from-sources.sh" --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --target "$PWD/generated-code-quality-standards" --summary 2>second.log && grep -E 'added: 0' second.log 1>&2 && grep -E 'archived: 0' second.log 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
